description: Stock list for all HD materials

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(bp.bp_name)
FROM public.baseplate bp
LEFT JOIN public.proto_assembly pr ON bp.bp_name = pr.bp_name
WHERE bp.proto_no IS NULL 
  AND bp.resolution = 'HD'
  AND bp.geometry = 'Full'
  AND pr.proto_name is NULL

SELECT COUNT(material.sen_name)
FROM public.sensor material
LEFT JOIN public.proto_assembly pmodule ON material.sen_name = pmodule.sen_name
WHERE material.proto_no IS NULL 
  AND material.resolution = 'HD'
  AND material.geometry = 'Full'
  AND pmodule.proto_name is NULL

panels.description:
Count of free hexaboard
Check free entry in **hexaboard** and they are not recorded in **module_assembly** table

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(material.hxb_name)
FROM public.hexaboard material
LEFT JOIN public.module_assembly module ON material.hxb_name = module.hxb_name
WHERE material.module_no IS NULL 
  AND material.resolution = 'HD'
  AND material.geometry = 'Full'
  AND module.module_name is NULL
